title: gymnogramma distans
intro: Gymnogramma distans is a type of fern, also known as a Gymnogramma fern, which is a flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae. The Gymnogramma distans plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma distans include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
